wordplay_note: The little man who outwits his employers with his own erased memories
card_description: Jennings (Michael) (meaning "Jennings = little John") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Paycheck*. Engineer who has his memory wiped after a secret project but leaves himself crucial clues. Name note: The little man who outwits his employers with his own erased memories. Self-trust across an amnesiac gap — your past self knew what your present self needs. First appears in *Paycheck*.

reference.brief: Engineer who has his memory wiped after a secret project but leaves himself crucial clues
reference.significance: Self-trust across an amnesiac gap — your past self knew what your present self needs
